response.summary: I WILL listen to my unnecessarily hype "for when at night in the woods" playlist out loud at night in the woods when i'm getting...
response.body:
I WILL listen to my unnecessarily hype “for when at night in the woods” playlist out loud at night in the woods when i’m getting back late from a hike or somethin, but only with my herb sythe unsheathed in my left hand and the powerbank on strobe light.

Booking it through the woods with these on is the funniest mental image i’ve ever had😭

reblog.comment:

Booking it through the woods with these on is the funniest mental image i’ve ever had😭

Booking it through the woods with these on is the funniest mental image i’ve ever had😭
